sys_remote_update_set.name: Catalog — MacBook Pro 16" M5 Max
sys_remote_update_set.description: Adds a new "MacBook Pro 16\" M5 Max" catalog item to the Service Catalog under the Hardware category, cloned from the existing Developer Laptop (Mac) item (sys_id 774906834fbb4200086eeed18110c737). Updated specs and pricing for the Apple M5 Max generation.

sys_update_xml.name: sc_cat_item_e5471164167195981546a5abdd6388c9
sys_update_xml.payload:
e5471164167195981546a5abdd6388c9 MacBook Pro 16" M5 Max MacBook Pro 16" M5 Max MacBook Pro 16-inch with Apple M5 Max chip MacBook Pro 16" M5 Max

The most powerful MacBook Pro ever. The M5 Max chip delivers extraordinary performance for the most demanding pro workflows — compiling, rendering, machine learning, and large-scale data analysis.

Technical Specs:

  • Apple M5 Max chip (16-core CPU, 40-core GPU)
  • 48GB unified memory
  • 1TB SSD storage
  • 16.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, 120Hz ProMotion
  • 22-hour battery life
  • MagSafe 3, Thunderbolt 5 (x3), HDMI, SDXC
  • Backlit Magic Keyboard with Touch ID
]]> 3499 0 0 0 true false on_both restricted snc_internal e0d08b13c3330100c8b837659bba8fb4 d258b953c611227a0146101fb1be7c31 1970-01-03 00:00:00 item true true true true use_desktop_picture non_zero semi_automated 30f3d26187e92300e0ef0cf888cb0b91 global sc_cat_item sc_cat_item_e5471164167195981546a5abdd6388c9

sys_update_xml.name: item_option_new_e88a5f0bf0b71a11855227c4f3a22da2
